# terrible_community_general_capabilities (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `capability` (String) Desired capability to set (with operator and flags, if `state=present`) or remove (if `state=absent`).
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `path` (String) Specifies the path to the file to be managed.

### Optional

- `state` (String) Whether the entry should be present or absent in the file's capabilities.
